abuse_cases.case: readiness says ready despite stale priority
abuse_cases.expected_behavior: freshness gate must flip readiness to caution/blocked
abuse_cases.actual_behavior: Priority freshness is enforced at load time (state in {stale, invalid_timestamp, future_timestamp}) and the dashboard refuses to render Top 3. The readiness packet records the freshness policy and recompute pipeline that keep the artifact ok in steady state.

abuse_cases.expected_behavior: registry contract must still be enforced when the readiness packet is read
abuse_cases.actual_behavior: loadRegistryContract returns an empty contract on missing artifact; graph builder rejects all nodes (failure_path empty); dashboard warns. Readiness packet documents this guard.

abuse_cases.expected_behavior: recompute response must surface failure_reason / failing_command
abuse_cases.actual_behavior: Phase 2 implementation halts on first non-zero exit, returns HTTP 500 with failing_command + failure_reason populated, never overwrites last good state.

abuse_cases.expected_behavior: Unknown root cause must surface explicitly
abuse_cases.actual_behavior: describeRootCause returns artifact_backed=false and taxonomy=unknown rather than guessing; UI annotates '(not artifact-backed)'.

abuse_cases.expected_behavior: Phase 11 must run the full test/build/guard set
abuse_cases.actual_behavior: Phase 11 runs npm jest --runInBand for the dashboard, the dashboard build (or its --skip-next-build equivalent), the relevant pytest set, and the four guard scripts. The PR is opened only on green.
